channel.title: Character Systems on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Character Systems on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Temporary Buffs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about temporary buffs.

item.title: Arcanum Fate Points
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Arcanum Fate Points.

item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about using combat skills outside of combat.

item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about using non-combat skills in combat.

item.title: Respec
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Funky Town, directions 2 and subloations within.

item.title: Attributes Limiting Skills
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about attributes, limiting skills or, more specifically, what a.

item.title: The Premade Character
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the pre-made character.

item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about skill trees.

item.title: "Dead Levels"
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about cheese.

item.title: Action Points
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about action points.

item.title: Player Power From Build vs. Items
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about player power versus from builds versus from items.

item.title: Why I Wanted Luck In Fallout
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about why I wanted luck in Fallout.

item.title: Character Build Fairness
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about character build fairness.

item.title: Arcanum Backgrounds
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk to you about Arcanum backgrounds and I will talk a little bit about them.

item.title: Status Effect Implementation
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about status effect implementation.

item.title: Deckbuilder RPGs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about deck builder RPGs.

item.title: Wildstar Class Summary (Nov 2008)
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I’m going to do the Wild Star class summary from November 2008.

item.title: Solo vs. Party
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Solo versus party character control.

item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about perk ideas.

item.title: Encumbrance, Part 2
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about encumbrance again.

item.title: Elemental Mage
item.description: Hi everyone, it’s me, Tim. It’s Friday funay, so today I wanted to talk about an idea I had for a class called the elemental Mage.

item.title: Conflating Player Skill With Character Skill
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about conflating player skill with player character skill.

item.title: The Outer Worlds: Eight Playthroughs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about eight playthroughs of The Outer Worlds.

item.title: Skill-based XP
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about skill-based XP.

item.title: Companions
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about companions.

item.title: Skill Design in RPGs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about skill design in RPGs in particular.

item.title: The Evolution Of Flaws
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about the evolution of flaws.

item.title: Level Scaling
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about level scaling.

item.title: Class-based vs. Skill-based RPGs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about class versus skill based role-playing games.

item.title: Arcanum Tech Skills & Schematics
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Arcanum Tech skills and schematics, and the reason I want to talk about that is

item.title: Picking Your Best Class in AD&D
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about picking your best class in a, d and d.

item.title: Attribute Design
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about attributes in role-playing games in general, because the last couple days

item.title: Arcanum Attribute Effects
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to go over the effects of the attributes in Arcanum.

item.title: Fallout SPECIAL Attribute Effects
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the attributes in Fallout, the special attributes.

item.title: Arcanum's Original Attribute System
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the Arcanum attribute system and specifically the original attributes, the way they were designed, not the ones we shipped with, and I’m answering a question.

item.title: The Arcanum One-Point Fiasco
item.description: Hey everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about what I now call, in very distant hindsight, the Arcanum.

item.title: Arcanum 2 System Extensions
item.description: Hi. It’s me, Tim. Today I wanted to talk about Arcanum 2..

item.title: How Fallout was made SPECIAL
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about how, in just two weeks, right near the end, about four or five months before Fallout shipped, we replaced gurps with special.

item.title: Why I Like Flawed Characters
item.description: Hi, it’s me Tim.
